message:
feat: offsite backup sync to iCloud Drive after each dolt backup cycle

After syncing local dolt backups, rsync the backup dir to iCloud Drive
at ~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/gt-dolt-backup/.
Apple syncs this to their cloud automatically, providing offsite
replication. Non-fatal — if iCloud unavailable, logs and continues.

Stopgap until proper dolt remote push to DoltHub is configured.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
